brief: Trump's combative NATO summit and Ukraine Patriot missile deal dominate news, while HCI research papers explore game world generation, prompt engineering, and weather visualization.
news_summary: Trump at NATO summit criticizes allies and offers Ukraine license to produce Patriot missiles; other top stories include Clacton byelection, Gaza aid worker killed, and US charges in Indian gang leader murder.
papers_summary: Papers feature advances in long-horizon video world generation (AlayaWorld), an agentic tutor for prompt engineering, and interactive weather visualization tools (GeoXplain).
